atoms.source_snippet:
ritual-metrics.workspace = true
ritual-scheduling.workspace = true
ritual-heartbeat-tracker.workspace = true
ritual-scheduled-verification.workspace = true
ritual-async-fees.workspace = true
alloy-consensus = { workspace = true, features = ["kzg", "k256"] }
alloy-sol-macro.workspace = true
alloy-sol-types.workspace = true
# concurrent data structures
dashmap.workspace = true
atoms.semantic_claim: The old transaction-pool manifest wires several Ritual crates, k256 support, sol macro/types, and dashmap for async/scheduled pool behavior.

destinations.evidence: Destination manifest contains the txpool-local dependencies needed by the active v2 async pool (`ritual-async-fees`, `ritual-precompile-addresses`, `tokio`, tracing, metrics, and Alloy kzg support). The old scheduled/heartbeat dependencies moved out of txpool into `ritual-scheduled-verification`, `ritual-scheduled-block-building`, payload building, block verification, and heartbeat tracker crates.

atoms.equivalence_argument: Reviewed structural equivalent: active txpool async behavior is wired through a narrower local dependency set, while scheduled and heartbeat behavior moved to storage-derived builder/verifier crates instead of remaining txpool-local manifest edges. The old manifest shape is not exact, but no txpool runtime behavior depends on the removed `ritual-scheduling` or heartbeat crate edges.
atoms.test_strategy: cargo check transaction-pool plus scheduled/async feature compile paths
atoms.negative_test_candidate: Old code depending on transaction-pool-local `ritual_metrics` or `ritual_scheduling` imports should not compile from this crate.
atoms.notes: Reviewed: old broad manifest wiring is replaced by v2 crate ownership. Txpool owns async metadata/pool dependencies; scheduled and heartbeat synthesis/verification live outside txpool.

summary: Reviewed: transaction-pool manifest behavior is structurally covered by narrower txpool async dependencies plus scheduled/heartbeat ownership moved to dedicated builder/verifier crates.
notes: Queue entry verified as file-0514: M	crates/transaction-pool/Cargo.toml.
